# Navaid Space

Navaid Space is the official website for Navaid Space, a space for mutual aid and collaboration.

The site includes multilingual pages in Chinese and English, including history, blog posts, and project updates.

## Main Pages

- [Chinese Home](https://navaid.space/zh/)
- [English Home](https://navaid.space/en/)
- [Chinese Blog](https://navaid.space/zh/blog/)
- [English Blog](https://navaid.space/en/blog/)
- [Chinese About](https://navaid.space/zh/about/)
- [English About](https://navaid.space/en/about/)
- [Chinese History](https://navaid.space/zh/history/)
- [English History](https://navaid.space/en/history/)

## Content Notes

The website content is available in Chinese and English.

Chinese pages are under `/zh/`.

English pages are under `/en/`.

Blog posts are published under `/zh/blog/` and `/en/blog/`.

Website content, including blog posts, page text, images, and other non-code materials, is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0), unless otherwise noted.

## Preferred Citation

When referencing this website, cite it as:

Navaid Space — https://navaid.space/
